message:
bd-u785: enhance regression harness HTML report with thumbnail grid UI

The HTML report now features:
- Thumbnail grid view for quick visual scanning
- Category-based filtering (by diagram type prefix)
- Expandable case details with golden/current comparison
- Aggregate statistics (total nodes, edges, pipeline timing)
- Quality metrics display (crossings, back edges, cycles)
- Timing breakdown per case (parse/layout/render)
- Modern dark theme with gradient header
- Responsive layout for mobile/desktop

Also adds artifacts/ to .gitignore for local harness output.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -25,6 +25,7 @@ a.out
 screenshots_for_diagnostics/
 rustc-ice-*.txt
 reports/
+artifacts/
 .agent-mail.yaml
 
 # Parser test output garbage (files created by malformed diagram parsing)
